title: phyla lanceolata
intro: Phyla lanceolata, also known as marsh fleabane or frog's breath, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyla lanceolata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Phyla lanceolata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
